profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Harta Djaya Karya Tbk provides construction and interior design services in Indonesia. It engages in design and planning, and civil and interior construction works, as well as offers custom and loose furniture. The company was founded in 2012 and is headquartered in Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia. PT Harta Djaya Karya Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Interra Djaya Karya.
